text: Cellular container vessels have several lift on lift off hatch covers to

options.text: Prevent water from entering into the cargo hold
Reduce the weight of each hatch cover
Carry more containers on deck Reduce the weight of each hatch cover

explanation: Cellular container vessels utilize lift-on/lift-off hatch covers that are designed to be stowed on deck. This design allows for the carriage of additional containers on the hatch covers themselves, maximizing the vessel's carrying capacity.
